classification.rationale: The update join advances a mutable transaction-style table and stamps a watermark.

primary_key.rationale: ProductAlternateKey is the declared primary key.

watermark.rationale: LastSeenDate records the latest refresh time.

refactor.extracted_sql: SELECT tgt.ProductAlternateKey, src.ProductName AS EnglishProductName, GETDATE() AS LastSeenDate FROM [silver].[UpdateJoinTarget] AS tgt INNER JOIN [bronze].[Product] AS src ON tgt.ProductAlternateKey = CAST(src.ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25))
refactor.refactored_sql:
with source_product as (
    select * from [bronze].[Product]
),

target_table as (
    select * from [silver].[UpdateJoinTarget]
),

joined_update as (
    select
        tgt.ProductAlternateKey,
        src.ProductName as EnglishProductName,
        getdate() as LastSeenDate
    from target_table as tgt
    inner join source_product as src
        on tgt.ProductAlternateKey = cast(src.ProductID as nvarchar(25))
),

final as (
    select
        ProductAlternateKey,
        EnglishProductName,
        LastSeenDate
    from joined_update
)

select * from final
